channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Former Spanish Prime Minister Zapatero is under investigation
item.description: A Spanish court is investigating former Prime Minister José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero for alleged influence peddling and other possible crimes tied to a...

item.title: Overworked and understaffed: Special ed teachers turn to AI for help
item.description: A fast-growing number of special educators nationwide are using AI to create customized education plans. Despite the risks, some research shows it cou...

item.title: Bees have coexisted with humans for thousands of years, yet their name is still a mystery.
item.description: Despite its short name and small stature, the bee is among the most essential and hardworking species on the planet.

item.title: Four major takeaways from Tuesday's primaries across six states.
item.description: As Trump extends his winning streak, general election rivals are emerging in competitive districts and states.
